Mixed martial arts events
2008 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki
Information
First dateMarch 29, 2008
Last dateDecember 12, 2008

Total events4

Chronology
2007 in KSW 2008 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2009 in KSW

The year 2008 was the fifth year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2008, Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 4 events beginning with, KSW Elimination II.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW Elimination II March 29, 2008 Hala Stulecia Wrocław, Poland
2 KSW IX: Konfrontacja May 9, 2008 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland
3 KSW Extra September 13, 2008 Hala Centrum Dabrowa Górnicza, Poland
4 KSW 10: Dekalog December 12, 2008 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland

KSW Elimination 2

KSW Elimination II

KSW Elimination II[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on March 29, 2008 at the Hala Stulecia in Warsaw, Poland.

KSW Extra[3] was a mixed martial arts event held on September 13, 2008 at the Hala Centrum in Dabrowa Górnicza, Poland.
